meta.coldDefinition: pass 1 — first request from the selected probe; edge cache state unknown (MISS expected on POPs without the URL in TTL window)
meta.warmDefinition: pass 2 — identical measurement started immediately after pass 1 finished (well within cache-control max-age=600); HIT expected if the probe hits the same POP
caveats: globalping may assign different probes/POPs between passes
GitHub Pages (Fastly) offers no TTL/invalidation control on free tier
